__comment: Kafka Connect → OpenSearch sink for the github-events topic. Create on the DEDICATED Kafka Connect service (avn service connector create <connect-svc> @deploy/opensearch-sink-connector.json). Replace connection.* placeholders with the OpenSearch service's connection info; set tasks.max to the topic's partition count. Index name defaults to the topic name (github-events).
name: github-events-os-sink
type.name: _doc
